positive: Minimalist stylized jungle cat silhouette, leaping over stylized abstract mountains and glowing crescent moons. Vibrant deep jewel tones against a dark cosmic background. Clean lines, bold graphic art style, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, centered subject, isolated on a solid dark background. Vector art quality, symmetrical composition. Digital illustration, detailed engraving texture.
